channel.title: Beloit on Adventures in Data Science
channel.description: Recent content in Beloit on Adventures in Data Science

item.title: Setting the Bar for 2018
item.description: Wherein I will not let perfect be the enemy of good, I will fix the image tags in the morning This new blog has a single purpose: To document my attempt to deploy a neural network in order to ethically address at least one issue faced by juvenile justice professionals and justice involved youth by December 2018. My name is Marty, and I have been a Cook County Juvenile Probation Officer for over seventeen years 1.
